alkylation reagent: alkylation and methylation by DL-Dithiothreitol (DTT, Macklin, China) and Iodoacetamide (IAA, Macklin, China)
cleavage agent: cleaved into peptides in trypsin (Sigma-Aldrich, MO, USA) at 37 ℃ overnight
labeling: labeled by TMTsixplex™ isobaric label reagent set (Thermo Fisher Scientific, USA)
reduction reagent: alkylation and methylation by DL-Dithiothreitol (DTT, Macklin, China)
